case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS WILLIAMS, RUBY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,934.05 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RUBY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
